'''Nahsu Minor''' was a temperate, grassy [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="GATORW" /> located in the [[Ktilac Regions/Legends|Ktilac Regions]], an [[Allied Region]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]. It was the homeworld of the [[Murachaun]] species, who, along with the [[Ktilac]]s and [[Tocoyan]]s, two other [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the region, developed a quasi-religion in which each species was seen as complementary to the other two<ref name="TEA" /> and constructed a network of cities, towns, and farms. At some time during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] took thousands of Murachaun off world to work as slaves due to their industrious nature. The planet remained peaceful, although thousands of off-world Murachauns secretly joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="GATORW" /> The Ktilac Regions retained Allied Region status under the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]].<ref name="TEA" />

[[File:Murachaun.jpg|thumb|left|150px|A [[Murachaun]].]]
